name: decision_rationale
description: Decision + rationale recall — 'why did I pass on X?'

exchanges.user_message: I run CloudBase. We were approached by a wholesale distributor to white-label our product. I passed on the deal because the margins were too thin — they wanted 60% of the revenue and we would have had to build custom features for them.
exchanges.assistant_response: Passing on a 60-40 split when it requires custom dev work makes sense. The opportunity cost of engineering time on someone else's features is real.

assertions.description: Decision to pass on wholesale deal is stored

assertions.query: why passed on the wholesale partnership
